description_long: This is a low-profile bed consisting of a large, flat, rectangular base covered with a white sheet and topped with a loosely draped, bright blue blanket. The bed lacks any visible headboard or footboard, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The bedding appears soft and slightly wrinkled, suggesting recent use or a casual arrangement. The blue blanket is the most visually striking element, contrasting sharply with the plain white base. The overall structure is simple, with no visible frame or legs, and the bed sits directly on the ground. This style is reminiscent of temporary or makeshift bedding often seen in urban parks or shelters.
description: A minimalist bed with a white base and a loosely draped blue blanket, lacking a visible frame, headboard, or footboard.
description_view_0: The bed is seen from the short end, with the blue blanket gathered and draped unevenly over the white base.
description_view_1: A side view showing the blue blanket spread more evenly across the length of the bed, emphasizing its rectangular shape.
description_view_2: The opposite short end, with the blue blanket again gathered and slightly wrinkled, revealing more of the white base.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, with the blue blanket covering most of the bed's surface and minimal white base visible.
